Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import sys

# Read the main notebook
with open\('Code/Boston_Influenza_GNN.ipynb', 'r'\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)

# Extract all imports and key function definitions
imports = set\(\)
for cell in nb['cells']:
    if cell['cell_type'] == 'code':
        source = ''.join\(cell['source']\)
        # Look for import statements
        for line in source.split\('\\n'\):
            if 'import ' in line and not line.strip\(\).startswith\('#'\):
                imports.add\(line.strip\(\)\)

print\("=" * 70\)
print\("IMPORTS FOUND IN MAIN NOTEBOOK"\)
print\("=" * 70\)
for imp in sorted\(imports\):
    if imp:
        print\(imp\)
EOF)

import pandas as pd
import os

base = '/c/Users/mateo/.claude/projects/C--Users-mateo-GNN-Influenza-Boston/7569face-7430-445c-b9b7-192fc4c5161e/tool-results'

files = {
    '2017/stops.parquet': 'webfetch-1773297386746-xh8s5p.bin',
    '2017/feed_info.parquet': 'webfetch-1773297387118-efx341.bin',
    '2017/trips.parquet': 'webfetch-1773297396704-wt0loo.bin',
    '2017/calendar.parquet': 'webfetch-1773297397420-ryu456.bin',
    '2017/routes.parquet': 'webfetch-1773297397827-t4p9sa.bin',
    '2024/feed_info.parquet': 'webfetch-1773297398780-o1mxht.bin',
    '2024/stops.parquet': 'webfetch-1773297399399-tytivv.bin',
}

for label, fname in files.items\(\):
    path = os.path.join\(base, fname\)
    try:
        df = pd.read_parquet\(path\)
        print\(f'=== {label} ==='\)
        print\(f'Shape: {df.shape}'\)
        print\(f'Columns & dtypes:'\)
        for col in df.columns:
            print\(f'  {col}: {df[col].dtype}'\)
        print\(f'First 3 rows:'\)
        print\(df.head\(3\).to_string\(\)\)
        print\(\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'=== {label} === ERROR: {e}'\)
        print\(\)

Bash(python -c "
import pandas as pd, os
base = 'C:/Users/mateo/.claude/projects/C--Users-mateo-GNN-Influenza-Boston/7569face-7430-445c-b9b7-192fc4c5161e/tool-results'
df17 = pd.read_parquet\(os.path.join\(base, 'webfetch-1773297387118-efx341.bin'\)\)
print\('=== 2017 feed_info: all rows ==='\)
for _, row in df17.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f'  {row[\\"gtfs_active_date\\"]} - {row[\\"gtfs_end_date\\"]}  |  {row[\\"feed_version\\"]}'\)
print\(\)
dates = df17[['gtfs_active_date','gtfs_end_date']].values.tolist\(\)
gaps = [dates[i+1][0] - dates[i][1] for i in range\(len\(dates\)-1\)]
print\(f'Unique gap values between consecutive rows: {sorted\(set\(gaps\)\)}'\)
print\(f'=> gtfs_end_date appears to be the LAST day of validity \(inclusive\)'\)
print\(f'=> next gtfs_active_date = previous gtfs_end_date + 1'\)
" 2>&1)

import pandas as pd, os
base = 'C:/Users/mateo/.claude/projects/C--Users-mateo-GNN-Influenza-Boston/7569face-7430-445c-b9b7-192fc4c5161e/tool-results'
files = {
    '2015/feed_info': 'webfetch-1773297621314-kv7n2g.bin',
    '2016/feed_info': 'webfetch-1773297622021-db6lr4.bin',
    '2025/feed_info': 'webfetch-1773297624379-oga63f.bin',
}
for label, fname in files.items\(\):
    path = os.path.join\(base, fname\)
    df = pd.read_parquet\(path\)
    print\(f'=== {label} ==='\)
    print\(f'Shape: {df.shape}'\)
    print\(f'gtfs_active_date range: {df[\\"gtfs_active_date\\"].min\(\)} to {df[\\"gtfs_active_date\\"].max\(\)}'\)
    print\(f'gtfs_end_date range: {df[\\"gtfs_end_date\\"].min\(\)} to {df[\\"gtfs_end_date\\"].max\(\)}'\)
    print\(f'First feed_version: {df.iloc[0][\\"feed_version\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Last feed_version: {df.iloc[-1][\\"feed_version\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'Num schedule versions: {len\(df\)}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1)
